result:
All 484 assertions pass. 

The bugs fixed:
- **Type-level (auto + manual)**: 14 type errors across all 13 modules — wrong accessors (e.g., `product-category-id` → `product-id` swap), missing arguments, wrong types passed to constructors.
- **Logic bugs**: `product-margin` had operands swapped (cost − price); `tier-discount-pct` gold/bronze values were inverted; `calculate-tax` had a stray `* 2`; `calculate-total` added discount instead of subtracting; coupon percentage divided by 10 instead of 100; `reorder-needed` used `>` instead of `<`; `entries-in-period` used `>=` for both bounds; `zone-surcharge`, `poline-total`, `line-commission` used `+` where `*` was needed; `estimate-shipping-cost-with-carrier` returned `base` instead of `base + surcharge`.
